details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that fully meets all rubric requirements. The agent successfully created a complete json_path constraint system including: (1) A new json_path_backend module with tokenizer and schema conversion functions, (2) Proper IR layer integration adding json_path parameter to SglSamplingParams and SglGen, (3) Complete registration in grammar_manager, base_grammar_backend, sampling_params, and all entrypoints (OpenAI protocol, gRPC, etc.), (4) json_path identifier properly integrated throughout the codebase, (5) Strong adherence to existing constraint patterns matching json_schema and regex. The implementation is well-tested with both unit tests for the conversion backend and an integration test kit. Minor deduction: empty PLAN.md file suggests missing design documentation, but the implementation itself is robust and consistent throughout the codebase.
